completed_tasks.name: RED package validation tests for exports, types, tarball contents, docs, and release workflow
JSDoc declaration generation, root export, and typed export map
Package validation tooling, tarball smoke, and CI package gate
Trusted-publishing release workflow, release docs, dry-run, and real publish auth gate
Publish @full-self-browsing/phantom-stream@0.1.0 to the public npm registry

decisions.decision: Package remains source-first ESM; TypeScript generates .d.ts files from JSDoc only.
decisions.rationale: Provides typed package exports without converting the source tree to TypeScript.

decisions.decision: Trusted publishing uses GitHub Actions OIDC with id-token: write and no long-lived NPM_TOKEN.
decisions.rationale: Matches the release docs and avoids committing or configuring a persistent npm secret.

decisions.decision: Published under the existing @full-self-browsing npm org as @full-self-browsing/phantom-stream; the declared @fullselfbrowsing scope was unregistered.
decisions.rationale: parzival1213 owns the @full-self-browsing org (lattice, lattice-cli); creating a new @fullselfbrowsing org was declined in favor of the existing one. GitHub URLs (github.com/fullselfbrowsing) are unchanged.

decisions.decision: Real npm publish was performed locally via web login + security-key web 2FA (auth-and-writes), not via the trusted-publishing workflow.
decisions.rationale: publish.yml is not on the default branch yet, so workflow_dispatch/release triggers are unavailable; local authenticated publish with explicit user approval was used instead.

next_action: Phase 10 complete. @full-self-browsing/phantom-stream@0.1.0 is published to npm (public) and confirmed installable (npm view -> 0.1.0, registry HTTP 200). Proceed to Phase 11 (FSB swap-in), which now targets @full-self-browsing/phantom-stream. Run /gsd-progress or /gsd-discuss-phase 11.
context_notes: Phase 10 implementation is complete and committed through plan 10-05. The package was renamed from the unregistered @fullselfbrowsing scope to @full-self-browsing (commit 8e0f7cd) and published 2026-06-16 as @full-self-browsing/phantom-stream@0.1.0 (public). Full package:check passed (405/405 tests, types, publint, ATTW, dry-run pack, tarball smoke) under the new name before publish; dist/types is generated (gitignored). Note: publish.yml still lives only on branch phantomstream-remote-control, not origin/main, so the trusted-publishing workflow is not yet dispatchable.
